question: After a trained radar representation is fixed, does observed PWV add information for future 10/20 mm/h occurrence?
role: diagnostic gate before any further end-to-end PWV architecture

frozen_radar.features: 1/8-resolution generative radar latent conditioned on the deterministic evolution forecast

probe.parameter_matching: radar-only and radar+PWV instantiate the identical probe architecture and parameter count
probe.threshold_selection: fit and calibration days are disjoint within the training split; probability thresholds are frozen before validation

controls.radar_only: matched probe with learned constant auxiliary slot
controls.pwv_spatial_shift: same aligned checkpoint with half-domain latent shift
controls.pwv_cross_event: same aligned checkpoint with deterministic cross-event PWV permutation

promotion_rule.required: aligned PWV must improve CSI by at least 0.003 and average precision by more than zero over radar-only and both same-checkpoint controls in at least three of four horizon-threshold tasks
promotion_rule.safety: no horizon-threshold task may lose more than 0.003 CSI against any control
promotion_rule.note: A pass justifies a capacity ablation and restricted joint adapter; it does not establish final forecast skill.
